prompt: For a heritage inventory, identify the authoritative body responsible for the Brassworks Market Hall in Westmere, then fetch an official design dossier or property register that names its original lead architect. Do not substitute the builder or a later restoration architect. Also say whether that record names the structural engineer; if it does not, write “structural engineer: not stated” rather than guessing.

fetch_primary.title: Brassworks Market Hall original design dossier
fetch_primary.content: The signed design dossier credits Luis Ferran as lead architect for the original Brassworks Market Hall. It names North Quay Works as the builder and does not identify a structural engineer.
